meaning: vt.假装,装作,捏造,<古>想象vi.作假
examples: One morning, I didn't want to go to school, and decided to feign illness.
I feign dispassion, but I'm not fooling anybody.
Many, in fact, feign love of life to evade love itself.
The Commission cannot feign ignorance when inundated with information of malfeasance from industry insiders.
Many of the women have given birth before and use that experience to feign another pregnancy.
